sourceAssessment.reason: The fixed artifacts expose no callback. Adding a dispatcher branch cannot cause Tinymist to issue a request or consume host-supplied package bytes.

blockingInterfaces.detail: Native PackageStorage::prepare_package performs synchronous in-backend filesystem lookup and direct HTTP download; it has no host request or package injection port.
Web JsRegistry::resolve calls a synchronous JavaScript resolve function and accepts only an immediately returned path; a Promise-backed LSP callback cannot satisfy this contract.
Client requests are asynchronous callbacks into mutable server state; PackageRegistry::resolve is synchronous, so blocking it would deadlock the browser Worker event loop.
The typed server dispatcher has no package handler port; even adding one would only answer requests after an artifact begins emitting them.

requiredPinnedUpstreamPatch: Introduce an asynchronous package-missing event outside synchronous compiler evaluation, carrying backend generation and complete project snapshot identity.
Accept a host activation/injection message that installs an immutable logical package generation and maps its files into the registry/VFS without native or Web network access.
Reschedule compilation after activation and reject responses from retired backend/project generations.
Propagate cancellation by request ID without cancelling other dependent projects.
Disable HttpRegistry direct downloads in the patched native LSP build and use the same logical protocol in native and Web builds.
Rebuild the pinned native binary and Web WASM, promote checksums, and capture positive, unavailable, cancellation, stale-generation and error transcripts before enabling the host service.
